subtitle: Do fun activities. Fill your life with things you like and people you like.
whyHobbiesTitle: Why Hobbies Help You Get Well

benefits.title: Fill Your Time
benefits.description: Hobbies give you things to do. Boredom is bad. Doing things is good.

benefits.title: Feel Happy
benefits.description: Hobbies make your brain happy in a healthy way.

benefits.title: Have A Goal
benefits.description: Learning new things gives your life meaning.

benefits.title: Meet People
benefits.description: Hobbies help you meet people and make friends.

benefits.title: Build Confidence
benefits.description: Learning new things makes you feel good about yourself.

benefits.title: Healthy Fun
benefits.description: Hobbies give you joy and fun things to do.

finalMessages: Pick something you like. Don't think too much. Just try it.
Try it this week. Give it a real try. You don't need to be good at it.
The goal is fun and a good life without drugs.

hobbies.name: Walking
hobbies.description: Walk outside. It is free and helps your mind.
hobbies.get_started: Walk 20 minutes each day. Look around.

hobbies.name: Running
hobbies.description: Run fast. It makes you feel good and strong.
hobbies.get_started: Start slow. Walk and run together. Apps can help.

hobbies.name: Hiking
hobbies.description: Hike in nature. Walk up hills. Feel the air.
hobbies.get_started: Find trails near you. Start with easy trails.

hobbies.name: Gardening
hobbies.description: Grow plants. Care for living things.
hobbies.get_started: Plant seeds or small plants. A window plant is enough.

hobbies.name: Explore Your City
hobbies.description: See your area. Find new parks and places.
hobbies.get_started: Pick a place you don't know. Look around.

hobbies.name: Cycling
hobbies.get_started: Buy or rent a bike. Get a helmet.

hobbies.name: Rock Climbing
hobbies.description: Climb rocks. Build strength and mind power.
hobbies.get_started: Go to a climbing gym. Teachers help you learn.

hobbies.name: Photography
hobbies.description: Take pictures. Learn to see beauty.
hobbies.get_started: Use your phone camera. Watch videos to learn.

hobbies.name: Water Sports
hobbies.description: Swim, sail, or paddle. Feel the water.
hobbies.get_started: Take a class. Start in calm water.

hobbies.name: Reading
hobbies.description: Read books. Have new worlds in your mind.
hobbies.get_started: Go to a library. Get free books.

hobbies.name: Writing/Journaling
hobbies.description: Write about your life. Find out who you are.
hobbies.get_started: Write free. No rules. Write what is real.
